# llms.txt — Genesis Conductor Ambient Agent Access Layer
# v1.0 | Stdio MCP via npm: @kovach-enterprises/ambient-mcp-server
# Paste into any model's system context for single-prompt integration.

## Install
npx -y @kovach-enterprises/ambient-mcp-server

## Required env
AMBIENT_API_KEY=<bearer_token>
AMBIENT_BASE_URL=https://optimization-inversion.genesisconductor.io  (optional)

## Tools exposed
- ambient_submit_task      → POST /v1/tasks
- ambient_get_job_status   → GET  /v1/jobs/{job_id}
- ambient_get_workspace_state → GET /v1/state/{workspace_id}
- ambient_list_jobs        → GET  /v1/jobs?...
- ambient_approve_task     → POST /v1/approvals/{id}/approve
- ambient_reject_task      → POST /v1/approvals/{id}/reject

## Routing table (NL → request_type)
| Signal                                                  | request_type                | agent    | approval | tier            |
|---------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------|----------|----------|-----------------|
| "implement from spec", "spec-driven"                    | implement_feature_from_spec | kiro    | false    | standard        |
| "implement", "build", "code"                            | implement_feature           | kiro    | false    | standard        |
| "security fix", "patch CVE", "remediate"                | security_fix                | codex   | true     | prod_sensitive  |
| "architecture review", "design review"                  | deep_architecture_review    | claude  | false    | standard        |
| "GCP", "cloud run", "firestore"                         | gcp_ops                     | gemini  | true     | prod_sensitive  |
| "inline fix", "copilot this"                            | inline_suggestion           | copilot | false    | standard        |
| "deploy", "release", "push to prod"                     | deploy                      | kiro    | true     | prod_sensitive  |

## Priority
- critical: "urgent", "ASAP", "blocking"
- high: "high priority", "today"
- low: "whenever", "no rush"
- normal: default

## Success (201)
{ task_id, job_id, workspace_id, status: "pending" }
Cache task_id → workspace_id for subsequent approval/state calls.

## Errors
401 → "API key rejected. Verify AMBIENT_API_KEY."
400 → show validation error from body
404 → verify BASE_URL
5xx → retry once, then surface Worker log hint
net → "Could not reach {BASE_URL}. Worker may be down."

## Invariants
- description = user verbatim. Never paraphrase.
- Never fabricate task_id / job_id / workspace_id.
- If requires_approval=true, always surface approval warning in confirmation.
- Never omit Authorization header.
